holdings.infoBox: AGNG is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are Novo Nordisk stock at 3.70%, Eli Lilly and Company at 3.68%, Edwards Lifesciences at 3.38%, AbbVie at 3.23%, and Welltower at 3.19%.

overview.description: The Global X Aging Population ETF (AGNG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Aging Population Thematic index, a market-cap-weighted index of companies from developed markets, whose revenue or main business purpose is tied to enhancing and elongating the lives of senior citizens. AGNG was launched on May 9, 2016 and is issued by Global X.
